_comment: Manually-maintained FOMC policy stance — the dot-plot/SEP and CME-FedWatch odds are NOT FRED series. Update after each SEP (8x/year) and after material Fedspeak. The collector loads this into snapshot.fomc_stance; the analyzer echoes it. 'stance' must be one of: hawkish | neutral | dovish | unconfirmed. While 'unconfirmed', policy cannot confirm a Q1 (Goldilocks) call and the analyzer deploys cautiously.
